info.description: API for managing accounts, certificate requests, and certificate authorities.
info.title: Notary API

post.description: Changes the password for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the user account for the provided account ID.

delete.description: Deletes the user account for the provided account ID.

post.description: Changes the password for the provided account ID.

get.description: Returns the certificate authority for the provided ID.

put.description: Updates the enabled status of the certificate authority for the provided ID.

delete.description: Deletes the certificate authority for the provided ID.

post.description: Uploads a certificate chain to the certificate authority for the provided ID.

get.description: Returns the certificate revocation list for the certificate authority with the provided ID.

post.description: Revokes the certificate authority certificate for the provided ID by adding its serial number to the CRL.
Uses the provided signing certificate authority to sign the pending intermediate certificate authority for the provided ID.

get.description: Returns certificate requests visible to the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new certificate signing request for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the certificate request for the provided request ID.

delete.description: Deletes the certificate request for the provided request ID.

post.description: Uploads a certificate chain for the provided certificate request ID.

delete.description: Deletes the certificate associated with the provided certificate request ID.

post.description: Revokes the certificate associated with the provided certificate request ID.
Rejects the certificate request for the provided request ID.
Signs the certificate request using the provided certificate authority ID.

get.description: Returns the server configuration exposed to authenticated users.
Handles the OIDC callback, validates the identity token, provisions the user if needed, and redirects to the application.
Initiates the OIDC authentication flow and redirects the user to the identity provider.

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password and sets a session cookie.

get.description: Returns server status information, including initialization state, version, and whether OIDC is enabled.

role_id.description: Removed omitempty - role_id=0 (Admin) must be included
